nodes.name: Webhook — Inbound (Twilio)
nodes.notes: Configure your Twilio number's WhatsApp inbound webhook to POST to this URL.

nodes.name: HTTP Request — POST to Backend Callback

main.node: HTTP Request — POST to Backend Callback

_readme.description: Menu-driven WhatsApp reorder conversation workflow for AutomatePharm.
setup: 1. Import this file into n8n (Workflows → Import from File).
2. Create Twilio credentials in n8n with TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID and TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN.
3. Set n8n environment variables: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_WHATSAPP_NUMBER.
4. Copy the 'Webhook — Outbound Trigger' URL into .env as N8N_WEBHOOK_URL.
5. Copy the 'Webhook — Inbound (Twilio)' URL into your Twilio console as the incoming WhatsApp message webhook URL.
6. Set BASE_URL and N8N_INBOUND_WEBHOOK_SECRET in your backend .env.

menuOptions.1: Confirm all items at requested quantities → status: CONFIRMED
menuOptions.2: Reject the entire order → status: REJECTED
